finding_results.notes: Negotiation now includes explicit institutional rejection (summons/family firewall denied), carve-out acceptance language, and an explicit concession from Ina before signature.
After tail confirmation, they execute countersurveillance (decoy walk, mirror check, side-door relocation) before operational talk resumes; route specifics are deferred to coded/off-channel exchange.

summary: Revised chapter_06 resolves the two HIGH structural/craft findings by restoring coercive bargaining costs in the interrogation negotiation and repairing operational competence in the surveillance scene while preserving chapter continuity, voice register, and heading contract.
